name: Rack of Lamb Dijon
recipeInstructions:
1. Have the butcher remove the chine bone or score it through so the chops can be cut.
2. Score the ends of the chops to reveal the bone for easy cutting.
3. Brush Dijon mustard evenly over the lamb.
4. Pat Italian bread crumbs onto the mustard, especially on the rounded side and top.
5. Preheat oven to 450°F (230°C).
6. Place the lamb in the preheated oven and roast for about 35 minutes.
7. This will yield a rare rack of lamb. Allow it to rest for 10 minutes before serving.
8. Serves 2, or one very hungry person.
Recipe adapted from FINALLY MICHAEL'S (RESTAURANT) in Framingham, MA. Enjoy!!!
